data.name: Demon King Domination: Deluxe Edition
data.detailed_description:
Malos, the evil ruler of the demon realm, declares war on humanity, spreading death and destruction with his army.

Princess Dianne, the fiercest warrior of humankind, sets off on a quest to kill him.

One will be victorious, and the other will face humiliation and defeat...

Features:


  • A Tense RPG-style boss
  • 3 Unique Endings
  • 1080p HD Resolution
  • Full English Voice Acting
  • An Original Soundtrack
  • Bonus Audio Epilogues
data.about_the_game:
Malos, the evil ruler of the demon realm, declares war on humanity, spreading death and destruction with his army.

Princess Dianne, the fiercest warrior of humankind, sets off on a quest to kill him.

One will be victorious, and the other will face humiliation and defeat...

Features:


  • A Tense RPG-style boss
  • 3 Unique Endings
  • 1080p HD Resolution
  • Full English Voice Acting
  • An Original Soundtrack
  • Bonus Audio Epilogues
data.short_description: Become the Demon King! Defeat the warrior princess and claim her body in an erotic RPG visual novel!
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 日文, 俄文, 馬來文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: MacOS 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
